Details

The model release waiting room
We refresh so you don't have to.
Tracking 8 announced models across 8 providers, plus surprise releases discovered on official model registries.

Official surfaces
We monitor provider APIs and official weight repositories, then verify access twice before announcing anything.

Wisdom of the crowd
Our estimate is the average of one editable release guess per visitor, capped two months out.

A place to wait
Our Discord is the community home, where everyone argues about leaks, benchmarks, and release dates while the wait drags on.

Alerts the moment it drops
Follow a model, a provider, or everything — by email or desktop notification when you sign in.

AI release intelligence
OutYet.ai watches official model registries, APIs, consumer launches, and open-weight repos. News tells us what to watch; only verifiable public access marks a model released.

Frequently asked
How do you confirm an AI model release?We require two successful checks against an official public surface before changing status or sending alerts.
Can news reports mark a model as released?No. Official news helps maintain the watchlist, but a machine-verifiable API, consumer launch, or complete official weights are required.
What release alerts can I follow?Follow one named model, every future model from a selected provider, or all releases across the waiting board.
